_comment: Runtime config for the hybrid worker. Paths are ~-expanded. The claude_args seams are the ONE place the exact headless invocation lives (matches the other pipeline's lib/claude_runner.py caveat).
_stage_timeout_note: Hard wall-clock cap per claude -p stage (seconds) so a wedged agent can't hang the conductor. Falls back to stage_timeout_default_s.

bootstrap._comment: Phase-0 idempotent tool installs. preflight runs these if the tool is missing, so the run is self-provisioning.

_phaseA_note: Baseline build: NO skills, NO docs-mcp (deliberate — a clean baseline, and skills must not leak into Phase A).
_phaseB_note: Integrate: adds the cometchat-skills + docs-mcp. VERIFY these flag names against your installed Claude Code version — this is the seam the other pipeline flagged. If your build loads skills from .claude/skills instead of a flag, set link_skills=true and leave phaseB_extra_args with just the mcp-config.

verify._comment: Per-component verify. e2e commands are dispatched if set; if empty, verify records 'e2e: not-configured' (honest, not a fake pass).
verify.e2e_note: Commands run in the repo/component dir. The build/integrate LLM authors the actual specs (e2e/*.spec.ts, e2e/*.flow.yaml). Empty = recorded not-configured. Install: npm i -D @playwright/test && npx playwright install; brew install maestro.
verify._vision_gate_note: When true, a Claude-vision FAIL on a call-critical rubric (ongoing/incoming) refutes the verify verdict — gives the vision judge teeth. Flip to false to keep it advisory if LLM variance causes flakes.
verify._mobile_gate_note: When true, an integrated mobile client that built+launched but connected NO call leg refutes the run. Default false because mobile<->web call automation is acknowledged flaky; the mobileRefuted signal is always recorded regardless.
